stream_summary: Document new feature with schema updates, examples, and troubleshooting guide. Enables users to understand and use per-step agent configurations.

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Step definition can include optional 'agent_config' field pointing to a config file
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json with 'agent_config': 'agent-config.json', When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses that config file

stream_steps.title: Update Step Definition Schema
stream_steps.description: Document the step.json schema with new agent_config field
tasks: Provide examples of step.json with agent_config
Provide examples of step.json without agent_config
acceptance_criteria: Schema documentation is clear and complete

stream_steps.title: Create Example Step with Agent Config
stream_steps.description: Create a runnable example step with step-specific agent configuration
acceptance_criteria: Example step is complete and runnable

relevant_context.relevance: Example step definition to use as template

success_criteria: Schema documentation is clear and complete
Example step is runnable and well-documented
Documentation follows project style and conventions
notes: Documentation should be completed after all implementation and testing is done. This ensures documentation is accurate and reflects actual behavior.
